dialogues.title: At the Café
dialogues.description: Ordering a coffee in a Romanian café

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Good day! What would you like?

lines.speaker: B
lines.target: Cu lapte, vă rog. Cât costă?
lines.english: With milk, please. How much does it cost?

dialogues.title: Meeting Someone
dialogues.description: Introducing yourself to a new person

lines.speaker: B
lines.target: Încântat de cunoștință! Eu sunt Mihai.
lines.english: Nice to meet you! I'm Mihai.
